headline: 3 Reasons BBY is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Best Buy’s shares (currently trading at $63.19) have posted a disappointing 13.5% loss while the S&P 500 was flat. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
